articles.title: France pulled 129 tonnes of gold from New York and made billions. Here’s how
articles.summary: France gold reserves: All of France’s gold reserves are now in Paris after the Banque de France pulled all of its bullion from New York. Instead of moving the yellow metal, it sold the bars held at the US Federal Reserve and used those funds to buy new gold, gaining €12.8 billion.

articles.summary_th: France ทองคำ reserves: All of France’s ทองคำ reserves are now in Paris after the Banque de France pulled all of its bullion from New York.
